title: task Prefer nested accuracy metric for existing frontier UI rows
description:
Feature: Existing model frontier runs display evaluation accuracy
  Scenario: A completed row has an old accuracy_axis but includes feedback_metrics.accuracy
    Given a model frontier row was produced before accuracy_axis used Accuracy
    When the procedure detail chart renders the row
    Then the plotted y value and table value use feedback_metrics.accuracy
    And future rows may still use accuracy_axis directly

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Closed without implementation per user direction: this prototype does not need backward compatibility for old model frontier rows.
